subject: Venusaur Spirit Link — item card showing a glowing circular or oval energy ring rendered in warm green tones
description: The card art shows a glowing oval or circular energy device or ring rendered in greens and yellows with light emanating from its center. The object appears as an abstract energy construct or mechanical tether. The background is dark, and the form glows against it. No Pokemon figure is visible — the focus is entirely on the glowing device. The warm green and yellow palette contrasts with the dark background, conveying a nature-energy theme.
